message:
feat(fwc): add schema navigator helpers, input validation, and fix package_cmd compilation

Add required_only_fields(), schema_summary(), fill_template(), and
validate_input() to schema_nav.rs for CUAL-K track support. The
validate_input() function performs structural pre-checks catching
missing required fields, wrong types, enum violations, and min/max
constraint breaches — each error includes path, expected, actual,
and a human-readable fix suggestion.

Fix pre-existing compilation error in package_cmd/mod.rs where
args.features was referenced but doesn't exist on PackageArgs.

Adds 26 new tests covering required-only filtering, schema summary
output, template filling, and comprehensive input validation scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
